queries={

'north_london_arson':['North London','arson attack','journalists surrounded','BBC','Sky News','ITV'],
'crashed_airforce':['crashed plane','crashed aircraft','KC-135','F-15','United States Air Force','US Air Force'],
'lebanon_minaret':['mosque minaret','minaret','southern Lebanon','Kfar Kila','Khiam','Aita al-Shaab','Aitaroun','Meiss al-Jabal','Taybeh'],
'ny_collision':['ground vehicle collision','New York airport','departed','departure','landing','JFK','LaGuardia','Newark'],
'iqair':['IQAir','most polluted','World Air Quality','air quality report'],
'dennis_coyle':['Dennis Coyle','Afghanistan release','humanitarian grounds','facilitated'],
'lukashenko':['Lukashenko','official visit','first official visit','Florida','United States','China','North Korea'],
'ipl_blitzer':['David Blitzer','Bolt Ventures','IPL franchise','Rajasthan Royals','Sunrisers','Punjab Kings','Delhi Capitals'],
'australia_ban':['Australia','temporary six-month visitor ban','Home Affairs','visitor ban'],
'latvia_drone':['Latvia','drone crashes','Russian airspace','Belarus'],
}
files=sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/03/21/articles.jsonl'))
for name,pats in queries.items():
    hits=[]
    for path in files:
        for line in open(path,encoding='utf-8'):
            a=json.loads(line); text=(a.get('title') or '')+'\n'+(a.get('content') or '')
            low=text.lower()
            if any(p.lower() in low for p in pats):
                if name=='fifteen_point' and not ('15-point' in low or ('trump' in low and 'plan' in low and 'iran' in low)): continue
                if name=='north_london_arson' and not ('north london' in low and ('arson' in low or 'journalist' in low)): continue
                if name=='lebanon_minaret' and not ('minaret' in low or ('mosque' in low and 'southern lebanon' in low)): continue
                if name=='ny_collision' and not (('new york' in low or 'jfk' in low or 'laguardia' in low or 'newark' in low) and ('collision' in low or 'landing' in low or 'depart' in low)): continue
                if name=='iqair' and not ('iqair' in low or 'most polluted' in low or 'air quality report' in low): continue
                if name=='dennis_coyle' and not ('coyle' in low or ('afghanistan' in low and 'release' in low)): continue
                if name=='australia_ban' and not ('australia' in low and ('ban' in low or 'home affairs' in low)): continue
                if name=='latvia_drone' and not ('latvia' in low and ('drone' in low or 'russian airspace' in low or 'belarus' in low)): continue
                idx=min([low.find(p.lower()) for p in pats if low.find(p.lower())!=-1] or [0])
                hits.append((a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),a.get('title'),text[max(0,idx-350):min(len(text),idx+1200)].replace('\n',' ')))
    print('\n###',name,'hits',len(hits))
    for h in hits[:10]:
        print('---',h[0],h[1],h[2])
        print(h[3][:1500])
PY
